comments.comment: clarify that the roll changes in combat, more. Boons are universal and apply both in combat and in a normal roll. clarity here
comments.resolution: Rewrote the combat paragraph to lead with 'the core roll changes' and clarified weapon dice replace stat dice for attacks. Added a sentence after the stakes paragraph explaining Boons/Snags are universal modifiers that work the same on every roll.

comments.selectedText: Roll d6s equal to the relevant stat. Read the single highest die.
comments.comment: here as well, pay dice for gambits
comments.resolution: Added Gambit explanation directly after the bold roll instruction: players may sacrifice dice before reading results to pay for Gambits (tactical side effects), with examples like pocketing a key or slamming a door shut.

comments.selectedText: If you’re attacking and want a tactical effect, that’s a Gambit. Sacrifice a die from your attack roll. If you’re skipping your attack entirely to do something else, use the categories above.
comments.comment: clarify that it is only dice with a +4

comments.selectedText: When you do something risky, roll d6s equal to your stat. Read the highest die.
Guard keeps you on your feet. When it breaks, real injuries start.
